result.content:
FINAL_ANSWER: 1/2, 1, 2
JUSTIFICATION: In the context of single-photon Hawking radiation and the transition to classicality, the dimensionless constants derived from the thermal distribution and the phase space properties are 1/2 (related to the zero-point energy/vacuum fluctuations), 1 (the standard thermal scaling), and 2 (the factor in the exponent of the Planck distribution/greybody factor context).
